paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.64, representing a decrease of 0.15% from the prior close and 25.98% over the last 22 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions around the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. Retail traders have reportedly turned bullish on the stock despite its sharp selloff.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. One Form 4 filing has been made, and there are 17 proxy solicitation filings in total.
